description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.20.1 Fixes
• Fixed "pull-to-refresh" accidentally triggering while scrolling event details — Custom pull-to-refresh no longer activates while a modal is open
• Fixed startup error when fetching personal calendar (iCal URL) — A regression that had been broken since the layout change in v1.19.0
• Fixed "default OFF calendars" (like English calendar) disappearing on reload when toggled — Settings are now stored locally on your device (localStorage) so they aren't affected by network delays

v1.20.0 Event Calendar
• Added English versions of "Myはんのう" and "Hanno City Government" calendars — Turn on subscriptions in the settings panel to see events in English (off by default)
• Redesigned subscription settings model — Now uses asymmetric management: "default ON calendars record only those turned off" and "default OFF calendars record only those turned on." Third-party and language-specific calendars now appear in their correct initial state

v1.19.2 Bus
• Select a different date from the top, then open "Take/Leave bus" to see that day's timetable directly
• Bus page now has previous/next day buttons + date tap opens calendar
• Bus "X minutes later" countdown now truncates (less than 1 minute shows as "less than 1 minute")
• Stop times now align in monospace for easier reading
• For dates other than today, bus timetables hide the countdown and show only stop info

v1.19.2 Garbage Collection
• Today (after noon / 12:00) and past garbage entries are collapsed by default (out of the way except for morning trash duty)
• Tomorrow and beyond: garbage entries stay open (collapse once and it remembers for that day)

v1.19.2 Small Improvements
• Changed detail link icon (was conflicting with mayor blog icon) to external link arrow

v1.19.1 Major Changes
• Top page now supports any date — Previously only switched to next/previous day; now the entire screen switches to any date you choose
• ◀️ ▶️ buttons on either side of the large date for previous/next day
• Tap the large date → Calendar to jump to any date
• Tap reverse badges like "Tomorrow" or "N days later" → instantly back to today
• Past weather also visible (back decades)
• Non-today dates can be shared and bookmarked via URL (?date=YYYY-MM-DD)

v1.19.1 Morning Garbage Duty
• Clock displays large above the pictogram only on "days with garbage collection today," so you can check the time even without glasses when bleary-eyed

v1.19.1 Calendar Readability
• Saturdays now shown in blue, Sundays and holidays in red across the whole row for clarity
• Holiday names (e.g., Constitution Day / Greenery Day) display in red bold in the calendar strip
